Introduction
DiffDock studies molecular docking with a diffusion-based model and confidence estimates.
Method
The system predicts ligand poses, uses geometric denoising, and ranks candidates by confidence.
Experiments
It evaluates on realistic docking benchmarks, compares with strong baselines, and reports clear gains. Code is available at https://github.com/gcorso/DiffDock.
Conclusion
This is a strong historical reference paper whenever docking is a current focus.
